name: classbridge-ghana
description: ClassBridge Ghana - mobile-first school workflow platform (root runner)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:up && wait-on tcp:5432 && npm run db:setup
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "green,cyan" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
